Explore educational games designed for kids ages 5–10. Dive into a world of fun activities that make learning math, reading, science and more an adventure!

🌟 Featured Games

Play our games now — more exciting adventures coming soon!

🤿

Math Dive

Dive into the ocean and catch the correct answers before time runs out! Three levels for ages 5–6, 7–8 and 9–10.

Ages 5–10 Maths 🆕 New
🦁

Jungle Words

Tap the words in the right order to build sentences in this wild jungle adventure! Three levels for ages 5–10.

Ages 5–10 Reading 🆕 New
🧙‍♀️

Witch's Brew Workshop

Mix magical potions, collect rare ingredients, and cast spells in this enchanting creative adventure!

Ages 5–10 Art & Music 🆕 New
🎨

Tube Sort

Sort the coloured liquids into matching tubes — a satisfying and tricky colour puzzle for sharp minds!

Ages 5–10 Puzzles 🆕 New
🧪

Kitchen Lab

Mix, react and discover! Explore states of matter, mixing reactions and chemical changes in your very own lab!

Ages 5–10 Science 🆕 New
